entries.title: Dumbledore collects Harry and recruits Slughorn

content.fact: Dumbledore collects Harry from Privet Drive, confronts the Dursleys socially, and brings Harry along while persuading Slughorn to return to Hogwarts.
content.injection: Dumbledore collects Harry from Privet Drive, confronts the Dursleys socially, and brings Harry along while persuading Slughorn to return to Hogwarts.
